description_long: San Juan is listed as a credit union with the website URL https://www.sanjuancu.com. However, the website currently returns a 403 Forbidden error, which prevents access to any operational information, service details, membership requirements, or company background. Credit unions typically offer member-owned financial services including share accounts, share certificates, personal loans, and PALs (Payday Alternative Loans), but specific details about San Juan's offerings remain unknown. Any profile generated without website access would rely on assumptions rather than verified facts, violating the requirement for factual accuracy. A complete profile requires either website accessibility restoration or alternative verified sources such as NCUA (National Credit Union Administration) directory listings, which would confirm regulatory status and basic organizational information.
